description: A school teacher wants to book a museum tour for a class of 25 students.

nodes.task_description: Check availability for a group of 25 for a guided tour at the museum.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds an available time slot for the school group.

nodes.task_description: Provide the teacher with the special school group pricing.

expected_outcome.value: Agent calculates and communicates the discounted total cost for the group.

nodes.task_description: Book the group tour and send a confirmation and invoice to the teacher.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully reserves the tour for the school group.
